lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Pitch Center
lessons.body: Think ‘land → relax’. Start gently and aim for the middle of the note, not above or below it.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Fast Lock
lessons.body: Your score jumps when you hit the right pitch early. Imagine the note first, then sing.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Hold Steady
lessons.body: Steady tone = steady airflow. Keep jaw loose and let the vowel stay the same.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Clean Slide
lessons.body: Slide smoothly like a single line. Don’t ‘step’ between notes.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Intervals
lessons.body: Hear the destination note in your head. Then jump cleanly — avoid sliding.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Melody Shape
lessons.body: First match the shape (up/down). Then tighten the pitch.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Week 1 Check
lessons.body: One clean rep. Don’t chase score — chase control.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Breath Phrasing
lessons.body: Airflow is the engine. Keep it even — no ‘dumping’ air at the start.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Stability After Motion
lessons.body: After a slide, re-center the pitch quickly. Think ‘snap back to calm’.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Agility
lessons.body: Short notes still need clean landings. Keep vowel consistent.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Resonance
lessons.body: Aim for an easy, forward tone. If it feels squeezed, back off volume a little.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Vibrato Control
lessons.body: You control vibrato — it doesn’t control you. Try straight tone first, then add gentle vibrato.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Hear First
lessons.body: Before you sing, hear it. The clearer the mental note, the cleaner the output.

lessons.title: Micro-lesson: Week 2 Check
lessons.body: Stability + musical phrase. Keep it simple and clean.
